mapper.select:
SELECT GROUP_IDX AS CODE_ID_2, GROUP_NAME AS CODE_NAME_2 FROM TEACH_CATEGORY_GROUP WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
ORDER BY GROUP_IDX
SELECT CATEGORY_IDX AS CODE_ID_3, CATEGORY_NAME AS CODE_NAME_3 FROM TEACH_CATEGORY a WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND GROUP_IDX = #{codeList_2} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' ORDER BY CATEGORY_IDX ASC

SELECT a.TEACH_IDX as CODE_ID_4, a.TEACH_NAME AS CODE_NAME_4 FROM TEACH a, TEACHER b, TEACH_CATEGORY c, TEACH_CATEGORY_GROUP d WHERE a.HOMEPAGE_ID = b.HOMEPAGE_ID(+) AND a.TEACHER_IDX = b.TEACHER_IDX(+) AND a.HOMEPAGE_ID = c.HOMEPAGE_ID(+) AND a.GROUP_IDX = c.GROUP_IDX(+) AND a.CATEGORY_IDX = c.CATEGORY_IDX(+) AND a.HOMEPAGE_ID = d.HOMEPAGE_ID(+) AND a.GROUP_IDX = d.GROUP_IDX(+) AND a.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND a.GROUP_IDX = #{codeList_2} AND a.CATEGORY_IDX = #{codeList_3} AND a.DELETE_YN = 'N' ORDER BY a.GROUP_IDX, a.CATEGORY_IDX, a.PRINT_SEQ ASC

SELECT B.TEACHER_NAME as member_name, B.TEACHER_CELL_PHONE as member_phone FROM TEACH A, TEACHER B WHERE A.HOMEPAGE_ID = B.HOMEPAGE_ID AND A.TEACHER_IDX = B.TEACHER_IDX AND A.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND A.GROUP_IDX = #{codeList_2} AND A.CATEGORY_IDX = #{codeList_3} AND A.TEACH_IDX = #{codeList_4} AND A.DELETE_YN = 'N'

SELECT TO_CHAR(HOPE_REQ_DT, 'DD') AS CODE_NAME_4, TO_CHAR(HOPE_REQ_DT, 'DD') AS CODE_ID_4 FROM FIELD_SUPPORT WHERE 1=1 AND HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND TO_CHAR(hope_req_dt,'YYYY') = #{codeList_2} AND TO_CHAR(hope_req_dt,'MM') = #{codeList_3} GROUP BY HOPE_REQ_DT
SELECT FACILITY_IDX AS CODE_ID_2, FACILITY_NAME AS CODE_NAME_2 FROM FACILITY WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' ORDER BY FACILITY_IDX ASC

SELECT A.FACILITY_NAME AS MEMBER_NAME, B.APPLY_PHONE AS MEMBER_PHONE, B.APPLY_ID AS MEMBER_ID, B.MEMBER_KEY FROM FACILITY A, FACILITY_REQ B WHERE A.HOMEPAGE_ID = B.HOMEPAGE_ID AND A.FACILITY_IDX = B.FACILITY_IDX AND A.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND B.DELETE_YN = 'N'
AND B.APPLY_STATE = 'Y'
AND B.APPLY_STATE = 'N'
AND A.FACILITY_IDX = #{codeList_2}
ORDER BY B.REQ_IDX ASC
SELECT A.LOCKER_PRE_IDX AS CODE_ID_2, A.LOCKER_PRE_NAME AS CODE_NAME_2 FROM LOCKER_PRE A WHERE A.HOMEPAGE_ID = 'h19' AND A.DELETE_YN = 'N' ORDER BY A.APPLY_START_DATE DESC

SELECT REQ_NAME AS MEMBER_NAME, REGEXP_REPLACE(CELL_PHONE,'([[:digit:]]{3})([[:digit:]]{3,4})([[:digit:]]{4})','\1-\2-\3') AS MEMBER_PHONE, APPLY_ID AS MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_KEY FROM LOCKER_REQ WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
AND LOCKER_PRE_IDX = #{codeList_2}
AND LOCKER_IDX IS NOT NULL
AND LOCKER_IDX IS NULL
ORDER BY REQ_IDX

SELECT TEACHER_NAME AS MEMBER_NAME, TEACHER_CELL_PHONE AS MEMBER_PHONE, TEACHER_ID AS MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_KEY FROM TEACHER_REQ_MANAGE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND TO_DATE(ADD_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{start_date},'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{end_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND CONFIRM_YN = 'Y'
AND CONFIRM_YN = 'N'
ORDER BY TEACHER_NAME ASC
SELECT LEVEL AS CODE_ID, LEVEL || '년' AS CODE_NAME FROM DUAL WHERE LEVEL > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY')-14 CONNECT BY LEVEL <= TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY')) ORDER BY LEVEL DESC
